extract: The Love Ball (Japanese: ラブラブボール Lovey-Dovey Ball) is a type of Poké Ball introduced in Generation II. It can be used to catch a wild Pokémon, being more likely to succeed against a Pokémon of the opposite gender to the player's Pokémon. It is one of Kurt's signature Apricorn Poké Balls, and is made from Pink Apricorns.
